title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Experience the ultimate smartphone with A17 Pro chip, titanium design, and a 48MP main camera. Capture the world in incredible detail and enjoy all-day battery life.

title: Apple iPhone 14 Pro
description: A magical new way to interact with iPhone. Groundbreaking safety features designed to save lives. An innovative 48MP camera for mind-blowing detail.

title: MacBook Pro 16-inch M3 Max
description: Mind-blowing. Head-turning. The most advanced Mac ever built with the M3 Max chip. Enjoy a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display and amazing battery life.

title: Apple iPad 10th Generation
description: The colorful, all-screen iPad. Featuring a 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, A14 Bionic chip, 5G connectivity, and a 12MP front camera with Center Stage for video calls.

title: Honor Pad 9
description: The Honor Pad 9 features a stunning 12.1-inch 2.5K display, Snapdragon 6 Gen 1 processor, 8 speakers with Hi-Res Audio, and a sleek metal body for immersive entertainment and productivity.

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5
description: Unfold an immersive 7.6-inch main screen. It is a massive screen you can fit in your pocket, with the power of a PC and the most advanced multitasking experience.
